title: Upcoming Development Made Public
excerpt: I believe Monday.com should make public it’s development list before it goes live.  I want to know what changes might impact my users before hand so that I can be prepared to support changes that cause our workflow to be…

posts.author: rachelmele (Rachel Mele)
posts.cookedHtml: I believe Monday.com should make public it’s development list before it goes live. I want to know what changes might impact my users before hand so that I can be prepared to support changes that cause our workflow to be different. For example, this week Monday.com changed the way the search feature works which greatly impacted my users every day workflow. They then changed it back because monday.com users complained.
